keyPatterns.auth: import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext'; const { token } = useAuth(); headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }
keyPatterns.routing: App.js — Routes component, ProtectedRoute wrapper for auth-required pages
keyPatterns.textColors: Hardcoded hex (#e0e0ee, #c8c8dc) — do NOT use var(--text-secondary) or var(--text-muted)
keyPatterns.lightMode: html[data-theme='light'] with !important in index.css — highest specificity override

recentWork: Added snapToCursor={true} to all 11 Chessboard components (piece drag fix)
Hardcoded text colors across 24+ files — replaced CSS variables with #e0e0ee / #c8c8dc
Added !important inline style overrides in Home.jsx for dark mode readability
Built light mode nuclear override (~240 lines CSS) with html[data-theme='light'] selectors
Deleted broken favicon.svg + generated favicons, set favicon.ico as primary in index.html
Purged 217MB pptx from git history, reduced .git from 217MB to 1.1MB
Pushed all changes to GitHub (commit fdb5080)
importantNotes: DO NOT use 'git add -A' or 'git add .' — it picks up large files like .pptx
DO NOT use var(--text-secondary) or var(--text-muted) for text colors — they don't apply reliably, use hardcoded hex
Light mode overrides MUST use html[data-theme='light'] selector (not :root) for specificity over inline styles

3x3x3.description: Riddick's quality assurance workflow for building features
steps: Phase 1 — PLAN-AUDIT (x3): Plan the implementation, audit the plan, repeat 3 times
Phase 2 — CHECK-AUDIT (x3): Check the plan against existing code, audit plan again, repeat 3 times
Phase 3 — BUILD-AUDIT (x3): Build the feature, audit the build, repeat 3 times

3x3x3x3.description: Extended version — adds internet research phase before the 3x3x3
steps: Phase 0 — RESEARCH (x3): Research the internet for the best known documented and used methods of completing the task, repeat 3 times to ensure thorough coverage
Phase 1 — PLAN-AUDIT (x3): Plan the implementation informed by research, audit the plan, repeat 3 times
Phase 2 — CHECK-AUDIT (x3): Check the plan against existing code, audit plan again, repeat 3 times
Phase 3 — BUILD-AUDIT (x3): Build the feature, audit the build, repeat 3 times
